title: RF elements Bracket and TwistPort adapter kit for Wave AP Gen2
description: The RF elements BR-WG2-BUNDLE is a mounting kit designed to attach the Wave-AP-Gen2 directly to an asymmetrical TwistPort antenna . Although the BR-WG2 mount was specifically designed for the UI WaveAP Gen2, it can also be used with a wide range of other devices The BR-WG2 is compatible with any RF elements asymmetrical Horn antenna that uses the structural aluminum ring . It is also compatible with the latest 6GHz Wideband Horn antennas, older 5GHz AH-TP models and all asymmetrical 4x4 Horn antennas BR-WG2 mount TPA-SMA TwistPort adapter (2) RP-SMA pigtails RP-SMA-FLEX-1M
specsSearch: Wireless features Polarization VH VSWR < 1,8 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) RSMA male
